_comment: Copy this folder to skills/library/<your_capability_id>/ and fill in all fields.
name: Human-Readable Capability Name
description: One or two sentences describing what this capability does and when the planner should activate it. This text appears in the UI.

_notes.stable: Set to false for experimental capabilities — they will appear in the UI as developer utilities, not user-selectable.
_notes.typical_order: Lower numbers run first in the standard pipeline. Use 1-3 for core analysis steps, 4+ for optional or utility steps.
_notes.skill_ids: List the skill_id values of the internal skills belonging to this capability. Each skill must have a matching folder under this capability directory.
_notes.routing_keywords: To make the CapabilityRouter activate this capability, add keyword/phrase rules to _CAPABILITY_RULES in src/agent/capability_router.py.
